message:
refactor(fcp-core): improve capability and enrollment derive traits

Enhance derive implementations for better ergonomics:

capability.rs:
- Add PartialOrd/Ord for sorting capabilities
- Improve Default implementations
- Better Debug formatting

enrollment.rs:
- Add Clone where missing for message types
- Improve PartialEq implementations
- Consistent derive ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
